user_prompt: X3 mobile game activity art, 2D semi-painted illustration, vibrant fantasy colors, soft cinematic lighting, high detail. BRIGHT sunlit shallow-sea diving ambiance (NOT dark abyss): ocean blue/cyan/teal + treasure gold + pearl white + warm sun; light caustics, bubbles, coral, pearls, seashells. This is a VISIT GIFT-PACK key visual that SELLS a specific beach-holiday storefront furniture set. SHOWCASE THE EXACT ITEMS being sold — reference image 2 is the wooden TROPICAL ARCHWAY GATE (stone arch, palm trees, surfboards, lanterns, climbing plants) and reference image 3 is the SANDY SEASHELL FLOOR tile. Display these ACTUAL items faithfully as the premium product — do NOT redesign them into a different ornate building or palace. Arrange like reference image 1's gift-pack layout: the archway storefront as the hero preview at top, the furniture pieces presented as product items in a row below, wrapped in a luxurious deep-sea gift presentation with coral, pearls and treasure-gold accents. ABSOLUTELY NO people, NO characters, NO human figures. NO baked UI buttons, NO text, NO numbers, NO watermark (price/labels added later by UI).
